name: Domain Trust Discovery
description: Detects enumeration of Active Directory domain trusts
query:
// Detect domain trust enumeration
// Trigger on nltest, Get-ADTrust, or dsquery trust
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(nltest.*domain_trusts|Get-ADTrust|dsquery.*trustedDomain|Get-ForestTrust|([aA]dFind|ldapsearch).*trustdirection)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
